name: ActBlue Political Fundraising API
what_it_does: ActBlue REST API for progressive and Democratic political fundraising platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve donation records and donor data, access campaign contribution summaries, sync donor information with CRM systems (NGP VAN), retrieve recurring contribution status, access FEC-compliant transaction exports, manage refund data, and integrate fundraising data with campaign finance reporting and compliance systems.
use_cases: Retrieving Democratic campaign donation records from finance compliance agents
Syncing donor data with NGP VAN from campaign organizing agents
Accessing contribution totals and fundraising analytics from campaign finance agents
Retrieving recurring donation status from donor stewardship agents
not_for: Conservative political fundraising (ActBlue is exclusively Democratic/progressive aligned)
General nonprofit without Democratic political donation compliance focus
Commercial payment processing without political fundraising compliance
best_when: A Democratic campaign, progressive PAC, or progressive nonprofit using ActBlue wants AI agents to automate donation tracking, donor data sync with CRM, and FEC compliance reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Political donation data is subject to FEC reporting requirements and heightened privacy. Donor identity for political contributions is sensitive and regulated.

auth.notes: ActBlue uses API key (client ID + client secret as HTTP Basic Auth). Entity-level credentials per political committee. API access requires ActBlue account and approval. Webhooks for real-time contribution notifications.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for campaigns and nonprofits; ActBlue takes a processing fee percentage
pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage-based processing fees on donations; no monthly SaaS fee
pricing.notes: Cambridge, Massachusetts 501c4 nonprofit. Founded 2004. Dominant Democratic/progressive online fundraising platform. Processed $10B+ in contributions. Integrated with NGP VAN as standard. Not available to non-Democratic/progressive campaigns.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Political donation data subject to FEC reporting and heightened privacy
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic Auth API key
Democratic/progressive-exclusive platform — conservative campaigns must use Anedot or WinRed
FEC compliance requirements — contribution limit validation and disclosure rules apply
No granular scopes — credential grants full entity access
Well-integrated with NGP VAN — donation sync with VAN is common integration pattern
agent_readiness.security_notes: Political donation and donor identity data. PCI-DSS, FEC. Basic Auth API key. US data residency. Democratic/progressive-exclusive. FEC disclosure requirements mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Political donation data with FEC requirements. PCI-DSS. Basic Auth API key. US data residency. Democratic platform. FEC compliance mandatory.
